ast.name: error
ast.source: GemmaNotes: failed to refresh editor view

ast.name: error
ast.source: GemmaNotes: failed to copy rewrite to clipboard
ast.target: GemmaNotes：将重写内容复制到剪贴板失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: GemmaNotes: could not save audio attachment

ast.name: info
ast.source: No vocoder specified, using default HifiGan vocoder.
ast.target: 未指定声码器，使用默认的 HifiGan 声码器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whisper-Tiny is extremely fast; E2B is balanced; E4B is more accurate.
ast.target: Whisper-Tiny 极快；E2B 均衡；E4B 更准确。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Gemma model used to tidy up transcribed text. Whisper is not supported here.
ast.target: 用于整理转录文本的 Gemma 模型。此处不支持 Whisper。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cleaned removes filler words and adds punctuation. Verbatim keeps every word as spoken.
ast.target: 清理模式会移除填充词并添加标点。逐字模式保留所有说出的词语。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: BCP-47 code (e.g. "en", "hi", "es"), or "auto" to detect per recording.
ast.target: BCP-47 代码（例如 \"en\"、\"hi\"、\"es\"），或 \"auto\" 以根据每次录音自动检测。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where transcribed text is inserted in the current file.
ast.target: 转录文本插入当前文件的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Heading used for the 'Under a heading' placement, and as the fallback when a placeholder is deleted before transcription finishes.
ast.target: 用于“在标题下”放置方式的标题名称，以及在转录完成前删除占位符时的后备标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Save each recording as a vault attachment instead of discarding it.
ast.target: 将每次录音保存为保险库附件，而不是丢弃它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically copy rewritten text to the clipboard when completed.
ast.target: 完成后自动将重写的文本复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将重写内容复制到剪贴板

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WebAssembly multi-threading is not supported in the current environment. Falling back to single-threading.
ast.target: 当前环境不支持 WebAssembly 多线程。回退到单线程模式。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unable to determine content-length from response headers. Will expand buffer when needed.
ast.target: 无法从响应头中确定 content-length。将在需要时扩展缓冲区。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: An error occurred while opening the browser cache:
ast.target: 打开浏览器缓存时发生错误：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 读取 WASM 二进制文件失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 读取 WASM 工厂失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 预加载 WASM 二进制文件失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 预加载 WASM 工厂失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `label_ids_to_fuse` unset. No instance will be fused.
ast.target: `label_ids_to_fuse` 未设置。不会融合任何实例。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `max_length` is ignored when `padding: true` and there is no truncation strategy. To pad to max length, use `padding: 'max_length'`.
ast.target: 当 `padding: true` 且没有截断策略时，`max_length` 将被忽略。要填充到最大长度，请使用 `padding: 'max_length'`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Truncation was not explicitly activated but `max_length` is provided a specific value, please use `truncation: true` to explicitly truncate examples to max length.
ast.target: 截断未被显式激活，但 `max_length` 被赋予了特定值。请使用 `truncation: true` 来显式地将示例截断到最大长度。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WARNING: `MarianTokenizer` is not yet supported by Hugging Face's "fast" tokenizers library. Therefore, you may experience slightly inaccurate results.
ast.target: 警告：`MarianTokenizer` 尚未被 Hugging Face 的“快速”分词器库支持。因此，您可能会遇到略微不准确的结果。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WARNING: `XLMTokenizer` is not yet supported by Hugging Face's "fast" tokenizers library. Therefore, you may experience slightly inaccurate results.
ast.target: 警告：`XLMTokenizer` 尚未被 Hugging Face 的“快速”分词器库支持。因此，您可能会遇到略微不准确的结果。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Attempting to extract features for audio longer than 30 seconds. If using a pipeline to extract transcript from a long audio clip, remember to specify `chunk_length_s` and/or `stride_length_s`.
ast.target: 正在尝试提取超过 30 秒的音频的特征。如果使用管道从长音频片段中提取转录文本，请记住指定 `chunk_length_s` 和/或 `stride_length_s`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: You are using PaliGemma without a text prefix. It will perform as a picture-captioning model.
ast.target: 您正在使用不带文本前缀的 PaliGemma。它将作为图片描述模型运行。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `do_sample` changed to false because `temperature: 0` implies greedy sampling (always selecting the most likely token), which is incompatible with `do_sample: true`.
ast.target: `do_sample` 已更改为 false，因为 `temperature: 0` 意味着贪婪采样（始终选择最可能的标记），这与 `do_sample: true` 不兼容。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No language specified - defaulting to English (en).
ast.target: 未指定语言 - 默认使用英语 (en)。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: <|notimestamps|> prompt token is removed from generation_config since `return_timestamps` is set to `true`.
ast.target: 由于 `return_timestamps` 设置为 `true`，`<|notimestamps|>` 提示标记已从 generation_config 中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Token-level timestamps may not be reliable for task 'translate'.
ast.target: 对于任务 'translate'，标记级别的时间戳可能不可靠。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `num_frames` has not been set, meaning the entire audio will be analyzed. This may lead to inaccurate token-level timestamps for short audios (< 30 seconds).
ast.target: `num_frames` 尚未设置，这意味着将分析整个音频。这可能导致短音频（< 30 秒）的标记级别时间戳不准确。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Model config has no `median_filter_width`, using default value of 7.
ast.target: 模型配置中没有 `median_filter_width`，使用默认值 7。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not find 'entailment' in label2id mapping. Using 2 as entailment_id.
ast.target: 在 label2id 映射中找不到 'entailment'。使用 2 作为 entailment_id。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not find 'contradiction' in label2id mapping. Using 0 as contradiction_id.
ast.target: 在 label2id 映射中找不到 'contradiction'。使用 0 作为 contradiction_id。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `language` parameter is not yet supported for `wav2vec2` models, defaulting to "English".
ast.target: `language` 参数尚不支持 `wav2vec2` 模型，默认为“英语”。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `task` parameter is not yet supported for `wav2vec2` models, defaulting to "transcribe".
ast.target: `task` 参数尚不支持 `wav2vec2` 模型，默认为“转录”。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: GemmaNotes: download the selected models in settings first.
ast.target: GemmaNotes：请先在设置中下载所选模型。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: GemmaNotes: open a note to record into.
ast.target: GemmaNotes：请打开一个笔记以进行录音。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: GemmaNotes: WebGPU unavailable — transcription will run on CPU and be slow.
ast.target: GemmaNotes：WebGPU 不可用 — 转录将在 CPU 上运行，速度较慢。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: GemmaNotes: no note to insert into; recording discarded.
ast.target: GemmaNotes：没有可插入的笔记；录音已丢弃。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: GemmaNotes：模型已加载并准备就绪。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: GemmaNotes: original text was edited; rewrite skipped.
ast.target: GemmaNotes：原始文本已被编辑；跳过重写。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: GemmaNotes: rewritten text copied to clipboard.
ast.target: GemmaNotes：重写后的文本已复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: label
ast.target: 正在将模型加载到内存…
